Metadata.title: Root Access
Metadata.description: Build startup proposals with structured AI workflows.

Hero.title: Build your startup proposal with structured AI workflows
Hero.subtitle: Stop guessing prompts. Follow a proven workflow.

HowItWorks.title: From idea to proposal in three focused moves

idea.title: Enter startup idea
idea.description: Share your idea and industry so Root Access can shape the workflow around your assignment.

workflow.title: Get guided workflow
workflow.description: Move through clear steps with practical prompts for problem, customer, MVP, and pitch work.

proposal.title: Build proposal faster
proposal.description: Turn structured outputs into a cleaner startup proposal without repeated prompt guessing.

onboarding.title: Use AI as a study assistant, not a submission shortcut
onboarding.body: Root Access helps with planning, outlining, research direction, and drafting prompts. It does not replace your original work, guarantee correctness, or encourage direct submission of AI output.

workflow.title: Review every AI output before it becomes your proposal
workflow.body: Use these prompts to create working material. Verify facts and sources, add your own reasoning, and rewrite the output in your voice before submitting anything.

FooterDisclaimer.body: Academic integrity: Root Access supports planning, outlining, research, and drafting. Verify sources, add your own analysis, and do not submit AI output as final work.

ErrorPage.title: Root Access could not load this screen
ErrorPage.description: Try again. If the issue continues, go back to the startup form and generate the workflow again.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.description: This route does not exist in Root Access. Return to the startup form to build a workflow.

GoalForm.title: Tell Root Access what you are working on
GoalForm.description: Add your startup context, then follow a guided workflow built for a university proposal.
GoalForm.cardDescription: Use clear details so the workflow prompts fit your assignment.

currentStage.label: What do you need help with now?
currentStage.error: Please choose the startup task you want to work on.

startupIdea.label: Startup idea
startupIdea.placeholder: AI study assistant for university students
startupIdea.error: Startup idea must be at least 3 characters.

availableTools.label: Available AI tools
availableTools.error: Select at least one AI tool.

ResultPage.missingContext: Missing startup context. You can still review the workflow, or go back and enter your startup idea and industry for personalized prompts.

emptyState.title: Add your startup context first
emptyState.description: Root Access needs your startup task, idea, industry, deadline, and available tools before it can build a useful workflow.

completionCta.title: Finished your first proposal draft?
completionCta.description: Review your copied prompts and turn the outputs into your final submission.

StepCard.adaptedBadge: Adapted based on your available tools
StepCard.locked: Complete the previous step to unlock this checkbox.

WorkflowCompletion.title: Workflow complete
WorkflowCompletion.description: Congratulations. You completed {workflowTitle} and checked off all required steps.
WorkflowCompletion.summary: Summary: {completedCount}/{totalSteps} steps completed. Review your copied prompts, verify the outputs, and edit everything before using it in your assignment.

FeedbackCard.title: Help us improve Root Access
FeedbackCard.description: Your feedback helps us learn whether this workflow actually reduces confusion, prompt retries, and time spent on startup assignments.
FeedbackCard.body: Share what worked, where you got stuck, and what would make the next version more useful for students.
